> [!example]- Tasks due today
> ```dataview
> TASK
> WHERE !completed AND due = date(<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD") %>)
> SORT priority ASC
> ```

> [!example]- Yesterday's unfinished
> ```dataview
> TASK
> FROM "daily"
> WHERE !completed AND file.name = "<% tp.date.now("YYYY-MM-DD", -1) %>"
> ```
